flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southeastern Oklahoma State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Southeastern Oklahoma State University rose 45% between 2021 and 2024 (16.3% → 23.6%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Southeastern Oklahoma State University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (54.2% → 63.4%).
